title: Flaky Fiery American Chicken Tacos
description: Spicy and energizing paleo-friendly dish featuring poached chicken, light brown soft sugar, and flaky texture, perfect for a flavorful dinner
instructions: Poach the chicken pieces in boiling water for 10 minutes or until cooked through
In a large bowl, mix together the light brown soft sugar, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper
Add the poached chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the sugar and spice mixture
Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes or until lightly browned
Stir in the lime juice and taco seasoning
Warm the flaky taco shells according to package instructions
Assemble the tacos by filling the shells with the spicy chicken mixture
